changed: Removed default autoplay and restored manual playback.
Kept preview hover near the native progress region by using a transparent overlay instead of rendering an extra visible seek bar.
Upgraded backend FFmpeg/FFprobe preview generation to emit time-indexed sprite/VTT data.
Added works upload phase messaging for upload, processing, and ready states.
notChanged: Native browser controls were not replaced with a full custom player.
Preview fidelity still depends on successful preview asset generation in the runtime environment.

validations.command: npx vitest run src/test/work-editor.test.tsx src/test/work-video-player.test.tsx src/test/blog-notion-workspace.test.tsx src/test/auth-csrf.test.ts
PLAYWRIGHT_EXTERNAL_SERVER=1 PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3000 npx playwright test tests/ui-admin-notion-autosave-info.spec.ts tests/public-work-videos.spec.ts --workers=1

risks: The overlay approach still approximates native progress interaction rather than reading native bar internals directly.
The browser preview e2e path still skips when preview assets are not generated for the uploaded fixture in that environment.
recommendation: Keep this pass and improve preview asset density later if closer YouTube-like fidelity is still needed.
